focus: Deep-loop and SpecKit workflow references for memory reliability assumptions

evidenceSummary.summary: /speckit:resume is file-first and uses MCP memory only as supplemental enrichment after canonical packet sources are thin.
/memory:save separates durable save routing from immediate retrieval freshness and labels deferred indexing honestly.
/deep:research startup memory_context lacks the later per-iteration non-fatal MCP error/timeout policy in the inspected startup block.
Deep-research command assets validate deltas/iter-NNN.jsonl while this packet's delta contract uses deltas/iteration-NNN.jsonl, creating verifier naming risk.
